name: storage_heldout_v1
provenance: Hand-authored synthetic held-out storage robustness suite.
intended_use: Exploratory benchmark for canonical storage extraction and update behavior on domains not used by memory_schema_gold_v2.
notes: This dataset intentionally avoids Memory.swift-specific labels and project names.
Required topics prefer compact canonical phrases over long sliding n-grams so the suite can expose topic extraction brittleness.
No-write cases live in scenarios.jsonl because the storage_cases harness does not have an explicit no-write label.
